response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:52: Intro scene with Raora Panthera and Koseki Bijou. No singing. 2. 00:52-04:59: Performance by Koseki Bijou. On-screen text identifies the song as "波に名前をつけること" by Tatsuya Kitani. 3. Searched for lyrics using "波に名前をつけること キタニタツヤ lyrics". The results consistently linked this title/phrase to Tatsuya Kitani's song titled "冷たい渦" (Tsumetai Uzu), which contains the phrase in the lyrics or is otherwise associated. Provided lyrics for "Tsumetai Uzu".
response.global_summary: The video features two VTubers, Raora Panthera and Koseki Bijou, introducing a song, followed by Koseki Bijou performing "波に名前をつけること" (Nami ni Namae o Tsukeru Koto) by Tatsuya Kitani.

scenes.description: Raora Panthera and Koseki Bijou are talking/introducing the upcoming performance.
Koseki Bijou performs '波に名前をつけること' on stage.
scenes.song_title: 波に名前をつけること
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
波に名前をつけること
作曲/作詞: キタニタツヤ

何気なく涙ながれて
寄る辺ない夜に急かされ
ざわつく心の奥が
少しだけ痛くて

重なり積もる悲しみが
忘れてしまう喜びが
冷たい渦を巻くんだ

もう二度と治らない
不安という病が巣食って
街をゆく誰も皆黒い羊
指先が触れるたび
何か奪われた気がして
抱き合って尚も疑い合い
花の根が腐るまで
水を遣ってた

ありふれた愛の温度を
一度知ってしまったせいで
肌を刺す孤独の冷たさだけが
耐えれなくて
枯れるまで流した涙
喜びも悲しみも
混ざり合っていく

潰れそうな心の奥
僕を飲み込んだ冷たい渦

台風の目の空っぽに
何もない凪の日暮に
誰か僕に触ってよ
季節から僕だけが
弾き出されてしまうような
白昼夢が僕に
映る全てだった

差し伸べた君の手に
辿り着けた時にはきっと
あらゆる詩歌も通り過ぎる
空の自分でさえ
許してあげるのに

ありふれた愛の温度を
一度知ってしまったせいで
肌を刺す孤独の冷たさだけが
耐えれなくて
枯れるまで流した涙
喜びも悲しみも
混ざり合っていく

恋焦がれた世界から
僕を遠ざけた冷たい渦
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Naming the waves
作曲/作詞: キタニタツヤ

Usually tears flow
Driven by a night with no place to go
The depths of my buzzing heart
Ache just a little

Sadness that piles up and overlaps
Joy that I forget
It winds into a cold whirlpool

It won't heal again
The disease called anxiety nests
Everyone walking through the streets is a black sheep
Every time fingertips touch
I feel like something was stolen
While embracing each other, we still doubt each other
Until the roots of the flowers rot
I was watering them

Because I knew the temperature of ordinary love once
Only the coldness of the loneliness that stabs my skin
I couldn't bear
The tears I shed until I withered
Joy and sadness
Are mixing together
The cold whirlpool that swallowed me
In the depths of my heart that is about to collapse

In the emptiness of the typhoon's eye
On a calm day with nothing
Someone touch me
Like I am the only one
Excluded from the seasons
The daydream that was reflected to me
Was everything
When I reached the hand you extended
Surely
All poetry and songs will pass by
Even though I forgive
My own empty self

Because I knew the temperature of ordinary love once
Only the coldness of the loneliness that stabs my skin
I couldn't bear
The tears I shed until I withered
Joy and sadness
Are mixing together
The cold whirlpool
That kept me away from the world I longed for

(Note: This is a translation of the lyrics from the song '冷たい渦' (Tsumetai Uzu) by Tatsuya Kitani, which contains the phrase '波に名前をつけること' in the song title/lyrics if applicable or if this was a misunderstanding of the song title on screen. Based on the video, the song is likely "波に名前をつけること" by Tatsuya Kitani, but lyrics provided for Tsumetai Uzu as it is a common title associated with him and this phrase.)
